commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=dcfe8d14feca5f5e2d1024fec08111008b4d9e9a)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an ACP manager helper and regression test so timed-out parented ACP background tasks can use streamed progress as `terminalSummary` instead of `null`.

PR surface: Source +20, Tests +89. Total +109 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the patch defect by source inspection: the new helper runs required-completion terminal inference before the timeout branch, and the existing completion contract maps common partial progress text to a generic blocked summary. The original current-main timeout symptom was not executed locally in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Needs a small code/test correction plus contributor-supplied timeout-path real behavior proof, so it is not a repair-lane candidate while the external proof gate remains insufficient.

target.title: fix(acp): preserve timeout progress summaries
target.body:
## Summary
- Preserve partial streamed progress as the terminal summary when parented managed ACP turns hit the OpenClaw-owned timeout.
- Add regression coverage for the timeout path so failed parented runs no longer end with an empty/unknown terminal summary.

## Real behavior proof
- **Behavior or issue addressed:** Managed ACP parented turns could hit the OpenClaw-owned timeout after streaming useful progress, then finish with an empty/unknown terminal summary instead of preserving the partial progress.
- **Real environment tested:** Moeed Mac Mini real OpenClaw setup, installed OpenClaw 2026.6.1 runtime containment for this same ACP manager patch, gateway running under LaunchAgent.
- **Exact steps or command run after fix:** Applied the installed runtime containment, ran `node --check` against the patched installed manager bundle, performed safe gateway restart, then ran direct Claude ACP and managed Claude ACP smoke checks through the live gateway.
- **Evidence after fix:** Copied live output from the real setup:

```text
Gateway health: ok: true; reachable; LaunchAgent running.
Direct Claude ACP smoke: DIRECT_CLAUDE_ACP_OK.
Managed Claude ACP smoke through gateway: MANAGED_CLAUDE_ACP_OK; task status succeeded.
Installed manager bundle syntax: node --check dist/manager-DmdQ2HZV.js passed.
Post-restart verification: gateway health OK; Telegram channel connected, running, no restart pending.
```

- **Observed result after fix:** The live gateway loaded the containment cleanly and managed ACP smoke completed successfully after restart; the source PR is the durable upstream form of that containment so timed-out parented ACP runs preserve partial streamed progress as the terminal task summary instead of leaving an empty failure.
- **What was not tested:** Full upstream CI is still running on this PR; the local focused regression suite passed.

## Verification
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `npx vitest run src/acp/control-plane/manager.test.ts` (1 file, 30 tests passed)

## Notes
- This is the upstream source fix for the local containment patch tracked as `acp-timeout-progress-summary-20260608`.
target.author: moeedahmed
